title: senecio valerianella
intro: Senecio valerianella, also known as the Corn Marigold or Corn Daisy, is a biennial or short-lived perennial plant in the daisy family native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio valerianella include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Senecio valerianella can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effectiveness.
